merge_decisions: Translated H1 title 'Building effective agents' to '构建高效的智能体' to keep parity with the rest of the article; H2/H3 headings translated.

All English product names (Claude Agent SDK, Strands Agents SDK by AWS, Rivet, Vellum, Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Anthropic, cookbook, workbench, SWE-bench, computer use) preserved verbatim.
Used faithful_readable style: preserved English structure, adjusted word order for Chinese naturalness, did not rewrite.
Pattern names orchestrator-workers / evaluator-optimizer translated as 编排者-工作者 / 评估者-优化者; preserved the hyphen structure.
Preserved the original 'topographically similar' wording in c10 (likely typo for topologically) — translated as '拓扑结构上' which retains the visual 'topo-' cue without inventing a fix.
limitations: Single-pass translation; no segment-level translations were emitted (chunk-level rows only).
Did not re-validate intermediate states between chunks.
